## Problem

What host-app or maintainer problem would this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Boundary check

Does this keep the app shell, XPC service, and runtime separable?

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler or narrower options.

## Additional context

Add links, diagrams, App Store review notes, or related Codex runtime details.
